name: Reopen ticket to change split tip Percent to Equal

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "2174"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('2', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('7', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('4', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Daniel" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Manicure" service
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
And I add the "Pedicure" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 2 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
When I click on the item "Technician" button
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "TECHNICIAN MULTIPLE"
When I select the "Manicure" service in the dialog
And I select the "Kelley" employee in the dialog
And I click on the "Apply" button in the dialog
Then I should see the "Kelley" employee in my cart
And I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I select the "Credit" payment type
And I fill the last 4 digits of card number "1234"
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see the employee "Daniel" visible in the split tip screen
And I should see the employee "Kelley" visible in the split tip screen
And I should see the text "TOTAL TIP" visible in the split tip screen
And I should see the total tip "5" visible in the split tip screen
When I click on the "Percent Split" button in the split tip screen
Then I should see all split tips non-zero
When I click on the "CLOSE TICKET" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CLOSE TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CLOSE TICKET', exact: true })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I reopen ticket with payment amount "$27.66"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$27.66' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$27.66' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$27.66' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the user info "Daniel" in the ticket
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
And I should see the text "PAYMENT HISTORY" visible
Then I should see the payment history "VISA (1234)" visible
When I click on the "SPLIT TIP" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'SPLIT TIP', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'SPLIT TIP', exact: true })
And I click on the "EQUAL SPLIT" button in the split tip screen
Then I should see all split tips non-zero
When I click on the "CLOSE TICKET" button
